title: Hearts of Iron III

cpu: AMD Ryzen 5 2400G with Radeon Vega Graphics
notes:
Runs perfectly after following the steps described in this post (https://forum.paradoxplaza.com/forum/index.php?threads/howto-hoi3-linux-with-wine.425470/). I played the tutorial and I started a new game without any problem. The steps I followed are:
1. Install the game (I have the base game plus all DLCs)
2. Run the game and let the First-Time Setup install the prerequisites. The game will crash
3. Run "WINEPREFIX=${path_to_steamlibrary}/steamapps/compatdata/25890/pfx/ winetricks directx9 dotnet20"
4. Run "WINEPREFIX=${path_to_steamlibrary}/steamapps/compatdata/25890/pfx/ winecfg" and check the Window Version: it should be "Windows XP"
5. Run "WINEPREFIX=${path_to_steamlibrary}/steamapps/compatdata/25890/pfx/ wine regedit" and create the new key "HKEY_CURRENT_USER/Software/Wine/Direct3D". Then, add the following string values: "OffscreenRenderingMode" with value "fbo" and "VideoMemorySize" with your GPU's memory
6. Always in regedit, create the key "HKEY_CURRENT_USER/Software/Wine/DirectSound" and add the string value "MaxShadowSize" and set it to 0.
title: Hearts of Iron III

cpu: AMD Ryzen 5 2400G with Radeon Vega Graphics
notes: The game works after following the steps described in this post (https://forum.paradoxplaza.com/forum/index.php?threads/howto-hoi3-linux-with-wine.425470/). I played the tutorial and I started a new game without any problem. The only issue: the game may crash when you start or load a game (this behaviour is occasional) and when you take a screenshot (F12 key).The steps I followed to make the game playable are: 1. Install the game (I have the base game plus all DLCs) 2. Run the game and let the First-Time Setup install the prerequisites. The game will crash 3. Run "WINEPREFIX=${path_to_steamlibrary}/steamapps/compatdata/25890/pfx/ winetricks directx9 dotnet20" 4. Run "WINEPREFIX=${path_to_steamlibrary}/steamapps/compatdata/25890/pfx/ winecfg" and check the Window Version: it should be "Windows XP" 5. Run "WINEPREFIX=${path_to_steamlibrary}/steamapps/compatdata/25890/pfx/ wine regedit" and create the new key "HKEY_CURRENT_USER/Software/Wine/Direct3D". Then, add the following string values: "OffscreenRenderingMode" with value "fbo" and "VideoMemorySize" with your GPU's memory 6. Always in regedit, create the key "HKEY_CURRENT_USER/Software/Wine/DirectSound" and add the string value "MaxShadowSize" and set it to 0.

title: Hearts of Iron III

notes:
Runs perfectly with the following steps described below:
1. Install the game (I have the base game without DLCs) 
2. Run the game and let the First-Time Setup install the prerequisites. The game will crash
3. Run "WINEPREFIX=${path_to_steamlibrary}/steamapps/compatdata/25890/pfx/ winetricks directx9"
4. Run "WINEPREFIX=${path_to_steamlibrary}/steamapps/compatdata/25890/pfx/ winecfg" and check the Window Version: it should be "Windows XP" 5. Run "WINEPREFIX=${path_to_steamlibrary}/steamapps/compatdata/25890/pfx/ wine regedit" and create the new key "HKEY_CURRENT_USER/Software/Wine/Direct3D".
 5.1 add the following string value: "OffscreenRenderingMode" with value "fbo"
 5.2 add the following string values "VideoMemorySize" with your GPU's memory 6. Always in regedit, create the key "HKEY_CURRENT_USER/Software/Wine/DirectSound" and add the string value "MaxShadowSize" and set it to 0.
7. Start the game. it needs to install .net 2.2. click on next. (Install does't work for me) and next the game start :)
